mapper.sql: t.key, t.name, t.description, t.color, t.created_by, t.modified_by, t.created, t.modified
name, description, color, created_by, modified_by, created, modified
name = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, description = #{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, color = #{color,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, modified_by = #{modifiedBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, modified = now()

JOIN to_tsquery('english_nostop', CASE WHEN regexp_replace(unaccent(trim(#{query})), '[^A-Za-z0-9@.\-\s]+', '', 'g') = '' THEN 'false' ELSE regexp_replace(regexp_replace(unaccent(trim(#{query})), '[^A-Za-z0-9@.\-\s]+', '', 'g'), '\s+', ':* & ', 'g') || ':*' END) AS query ON query @@ t.fulltext_search
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM tag t WHERE t.key = #{key,jdbcType=INTEGER}

SELECT
FROM tag t WHERE t.name = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
